risks.summary: context-acquisition stage cannot bind without an upstream emitter
uncertainty propagation, decision confidence, reasoning chains all depend on per-node confidence not yet emitted
interruption + recovery flows degrade to restart-from-safe-state
alternative-path execution flows cannot resolve targets
history queries and escalation packages cannot bind across sessions
runtime requires upstream provenance emission for replay determinism
guidance-package for troubleshooting cannot be released on 5/6 products
mandatory-warning surface cannot fire on 2 products at runtime
tier-4/5 handoff cannot complete without OEM channel contract
reasoning-invocation flow degrades when causal edges are not addressable
reasoning flow cannot persist hypotheses across resume
runtime must pin schema versions; no upstream pin contract yet
